CustomField.formula: IF(PC_SP_MS_Overall_Progress__c <= 0.20, "RED", IF(PC_SP_MS_Overall_Progress__c <= 0.40, "AMBER/RED", IF(PC_SP_MS_Overall_Progress__c <= 0.60, "AMBER", IF(PC_SP_MS_Overall_Progress__c <= 0.80, "AMBER/GREEN", IF(PC_SP_MS_Overall_Progress__c <= 1, "GREEN", IF(PC_SP_MS_Overall_Progress__c > 1, "GREEN", "OTHER"))))))
CustomField.label: SP MS RAG
